description.desc: Achieved a 28% faster file-format conversion rate by integrating WebAssembly in the browser, thus eliminating the need for a web server and ensuring 100% data privacy.
Designed and developed a Chrome extension that integrates with AI models to summarise web content.
Built the tutorial interface of AI summariser using Next.js, offering a 98% performance scale on Lighthouse.
Led a team of 4 developers to build the official website of the club within a tight time frame of 4 days, by effectively collaborating with the cross-functional teams.
Conducted workshops on the basics of web development for a crowd of over 150 people, explaining the concepts of JavaScript and ReactJS.
